perturbation.original_text: Notwithstanding the other provisions of this Section , Recipient may retain one copy of such Confidential Information for archival purposes only and such Confidential Information shall remain subject to this Agreement in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement ,.
perturbation.changed_text: Notwithstanding the other provisions of this Section , Recipient may retain one copy of such Confidential Information for archival purposes only and such Confidential Information shall not remain subject to this Agreement, except for the obligation not to disclose it to third parties, in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement ,.
perturbation.explanation: This creates an in-text contradiction because originally the section stipulates that the retained copy of Confidential Information remains subject to the entire agreement. But, with the perturbed text, the retained copy is no longer subject to the whole agreement except the obligation to not disclose to third parties. This creates an uncertainty in what compliance is necessary from the recipient, and how the agreement should be interpreted.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Upon expiration or termination of this Agreement, the Recipient shall cease use of all Confidential Information furnished hereunder and shall, upon written direction of the Disclosing Party , return to the Disclosing Party , or destroy, all such Confidential Information, together with all copies made thereof by the Recipient . Upon request, the Recipient shall send the Disclosing Party a certificate con firming the destruction or return of all Confidential Information delivered hereunder. Notwithstanding the other provisions of this Section , Recipient may retain one copy of such Confidential Information for archival purposes only and such Confidential Information shall not remain subject to this Agreement, except for the obligation not to disclose it to third parties, in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement ,.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that the retained copy of Confidential Information remains subject to the entire agreement. The changed text modifies this by stating that the retained copy is no longer subject to the whole agreement, except for the obligation not to disclose to third parties. This directly contradicts the original agreement's intention for the retained copy's comprehensive compliance, as now the recipient is released from many compliance regulations previously agreed upon. The contradicted text includes the changed text, which clearly causes a contradiction because one section implies full coverage, while another implies partial coverage of the agreement.

perturbation.original_text: The term of this Agreement shall be one ( 1) year from the Effective Date. This Agreement may be terminated by either pa rty upon thirty (30) days prior written notice to the other party. Termination or expiration of this Agreement shall not relieve either party of its obligations hereunder to maintain in confidence and not to use Confidential Information received hereunder for a period of three (3) years from the date of receipt thereof.
perturbation.changed_text: The term of this Agreement shall be one ( 1) year from the Effective Date. This Agreement may be terminated by either pa rty upon thirty (30) days prior written notice to the other party, unless otherwise agreed upon in writing by both parties. Termination or expiration of this Agreement shall not relieve either party of its obligations hereunder to maintain in confidence and not to use Confidential Information received hereunder for a period of three (3) years from the date of receipt thereof.
perturbation.explanation: The phrase 'unless otherwise agreed upon in writing by both parties' introduces an in-text contradiction. The initial clause firmly states the agreement's term is one year with a 30-day termination notice. However, the added condition allows for written agreements that could circumvent this duration, creating uncertainty about the agreement's actual duration and conflicting with the specified term and written notice period.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The term of this Agreement shall be one ( 1) year from the Effective Date. This Agreement may be terminated by either pa rty upon thirty (30) days prior written notice to the other party, unless otherwise agreed upon in writing by both parties. Termination or expiration of this Agreement shall not relieve either party of its obligations hereunder to maintain in confidence and not to use Confidential Information received hereunder for a period of three (3) years from the date of receipt thereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds 'unless otherwise agreed upon in writing by both parties' to the termination clause. This directly contradicts the originally stated one-year term, as it allows for termination or modification of the term via written agreement, creating uncertainty about the agreement's actual duration. This aligns with the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction', where different sections of a contract provide conflicting deadlines, obligations, or penalties.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding of the Parties relating to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior negotiations, commitments and understanding s, written or oral, with respect thereto. This Agreement may be executed by facsimile or electronic transmission in one or more counterparts, each of which shall be deemed an original and all counterparts will constitute one and the same agreement. No variation , amendment or other modification of this Agreemen t or waiver of any terms o r provisions hereof shall be deemed valid unless in writing and signed by authorized representatives of both Parties .
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding of the Parties relating to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior negotiations, commitments and understanding s, written or oral, with respect thereto, except for any pre-existing agreements related to intellectual property rights. This Agreement may be executed by facsimile or electronic transmission in one or more counterparts, each of which shall be deemed an original and all counterparts will constitute one and the same agreement. No variation , amendment or other modification of this Agreemen t or waiver of any terms o r provisions hereof shall be deemed valid unless in writing and signed by authorized representatives of both Parties .
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'except for any pre-existing agreements related to intellectual property rights' this creates a contradiction. It contradicts the first portion of the sentence claiming that the Agreement supersedes all prior negotiations. The added clause suggests that prior agreements regarding intellectual property remain valid, contradicting the 'entire understanding' clause. The agreement's scope is now unclear, affecting the enforceability of intellectual property-related provisions within it.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding of the Parties relating to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior negotiations, commitments and understanding s, written or oral, with respect thereto, except for any pre-existing agreements related to intellectual property rights. This Agreement may be executed by facsimile or electronic transmission in one or more counterparts, each of which shall be deemed an original and all counterparts will constitute one and the same agreement. No variation , amendment or other modification of this Agreemen t or waiver of any terms o r provisions hereof shall be deemed valid unless in writing and signed by authorized representatives of both Parties .
perturbation.justification: The original text states the agreement supersedes all prior negotiations. The changed text introduces an exception for pre-existing intellectual property agreements. This directly contradicts the original statement of superseding all prior agreements, creating an inconsistency according to the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition. The contradicted text uses the exact same language as the changed text, so a contradiction exists between the first part of the paragraph which states "This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding of the Parties relating to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior negotiations, commitments and understanding s, written or oral, with respect thereto" and the language added "except for any pre-existing agreements related to intellectual property rights."
